overall.description: First-person exploration through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from open streets to covered plazas and indoor bar environments. The footage showcases neon-lit futuristic architecture with wet reflective surfaces typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with safety railings

agents.ego_description: walking along wet street toward large building complex with neon lighting

entered.detail: bright orange metal railings lining the left side of the wet street
large multi-story building with illuminated windows and curved architecture
tall street lamp emitting red neon light
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking forward along wet asphalt. Orange safety railings line the left side while a massive futuristic office building looms ahead, illuminated by red neon street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered building entrance with vehicle barriers

events.description: entering covered driveway area under the building overhang
transition from open neon-lit street to artificial overhead lighting under the building

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overhang into a covered entrance driveway

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing shelter from the rain
striped safety barriers blocking vehicle access
thick structural column supporting the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered driveway beneath the building, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered concrete area. Yellow and black striped barriers line the path as the architecture shifts to an enclosed entrance space with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with café seating

events.description: exiting covered area into open plaza with outdoor dining and neon signage
passing by seated patrons at outdoor café tables

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza passing dining tables and café seating areas

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at outdoor table near the café
person seated near the café entrance

entered.detail: illuminated signage reading 'PORT CAFÉ' in gold letters
large white umbrellas shading outdoor dining tables
rectangular planters with greenery and neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the scene opens into a spacious plaza with the Port Café on the right, featuring outdoor seating with white umbrellas and neon-lit planter boxes. A few patrons sit at tables while the camera walks toward a traditional pagoda-style gateway in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale bar interior with counter seating

events.description: entering the Port Café bar interior through glass doors
turning to survey the bar interior before exiting back to plaza

agents.ego_description: entering the bar, observing the counter and bartender, then exiting back to the plaza

notable_agents.action: bartender working behind the counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: dark L-shaped bar counter with bottles and equipment
round bar stools with brass bases and purple cushions
vertical garden wall with dense tropical plants behind the bar
large glass windows overlooking the rainy plaza outside

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the upscale Port Café interior, revealing a stylish bar with brass stools, a living plant wall, and large windows overlooking the rainy plaza. After briefly observing the bartender at work, the camera turns and exits back to the outdoor plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with surrounding skyscrapers

events.description: exiting café back into the open plaza with neon lighting
turning to view tall illuminated skyscrapers in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza observing surrounding architecture and neon signage

notable_agents.action: person seated at outdoor table near building entrance

entered.detail: towering modern skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising in the background
large vertical digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: Back outside in the plaza, the camera explores the open area with the Port Café now visible on the left. The view opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers in the distance, illuminated against the night sky, while neon advertising screens glow on the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy, neon-lit street into a sheltered urban plaza and a high-end interior before returning to the open city. It begins by walking along wet asphalt past orange safety railings toward a massive office building illuminated by red neon lamps. As the camera moves forward, it transitions from the open rain into a sheltered concrete driveway lined with yellow and black striped barriers before emerging into a spacious plaza featuring the Port Café and its neon-lit planter boxes. The scene then shifts indoors to the upscale café, gliding past brass stools and a living plant wall to observe the bartender before turning back toward the outdoors. Finally, the camera exits the establishment to reveal a wide view of the plaza, where towering glass skyscrapers and glowing advertising screens dominate the night sky.
